name: BNB Skill Creator
description: Help a beginner create a Codex/Claude skill, publish it in a public GitHub repository, and submit a valid metadata pull request to bnb-chain/skills-hub. Use this whenever the user wants to create a new skill for BNB Chain Skills Hub, submit a skill to skills-hub, prepare a metadata JSON, or needs end-to-end help with GitHub, forks, branches, commits, and pull requests.

agentguard_result.summary: No threats detected. Skill appears safe.
